star_1.text: In Mission Mode, the fielders have extremely unrealistic abilities — they can almost fly to catch the ball, which takes away the realism and fun. The difficulty level is excessively high unless you watch ads to reduce it. Unfortunately, even ad options are limited (sometimes fewer than three), and if you fail to complete the mission early, you’re forced to play the entire 20-over match, which becomes very frustrating 😤 The difficulty in Mission Mode should be more realistic, and more ad options

Real Cricket Swipe is a fun, fast, and addictive cricket experience made for quick matches and easy gameplay. The swipe-based controls are smooth and responsive, making batting feel natural and satisfying. The graphics are simple but clean, and the animations are good enough to keep you engaged. It’s perfect for players who want short, exciting cricket moments without spending too much time on full matches.

star_4.text: It's definitely a good game. best cricket game till now. but here's some issues you can improve: 1. update the squads properly (including the masters) or let the players modify it 2. introduce some great bowling actions (like pollock, flintoff, donald, morkel, tahir, lockie, imran khan etc) 3. increase the highest speed for fast bowlers. there are some bowlers who can go over 155kph in modern cricket

This game is much better than RC24 in many ways! star_5.text: Real Cricket has great gameplay and graphics, but it needs some updates. Here are the suggestions: 1. *DRS Option*: The game should have a Decision Review System (DRS) option. 2. *Snikos and Edges*: The snikos and edges should work more effectively, especially when the keeper is involved, making it more realistic. Would you like me to suggest more improvements or do you want to add anything else? 😊 Thanks

The game has a strong base, but batting mechanics need improvement. Lofted shots often result in catches even when the timing meter shows Good or Average, which feels unrealistic and reduces control confidence. Batting timing should be more precise and outcome-driven. Opposition captaincy also needs refinement, as main bowlers are sometimes introduced too late in ODIs while part-timers complete full quotas. Please add fours, sixes, and strike rate to the scoreboard, and expand Career Mode waitin

This new update is very insane, smooth gameplay, higher graphics and the ai is playing like a real man, it's very very good. I think this is the best game currently in mobile cricket gaming. But, i wanna say that the new ovr system should be a little bit developed such as buying players should be made permanent because only seasonal players make it very tough to play well in the match, and the amount of buying a player is very high, but if it will be permanent, then it's ok with it.

The controls are exactly what the name suggests. A flick of the thumb determines your shot selection. It’s intuitive enough for a casual fan but has a high enough ceiling to keep a seasoned pro sweating.
